---
title: "Proverbial Philosophy: A Book of Thoughts and Arguments, originally treated"
---

## Proverbial Philosophy: A Book of Thoughts and Arguments, originally treated

**Author:** Martin Tupper
**Date:** 1838
**Imprint:** London: Rickerby

### Notes

See also [[person:1801]Martin Tupper]

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
